title: Midterm Exam Formula Sheet format
content:
Some of you had questions about the formula sheet for the midterm. Here are the specs:

1) one sheet of paper, front and back

2) it can be typed and then printed

3) it cannot be stored on your laptop or tablet

4) it can include anything you deem useful for the test

 

Pls let me know if you have other questions
